TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Isaetipan pahikukian Itiniay i Ji'an Cen no Hualien ko Isaetipan pahikukian a niyaro', 1,927 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 5,066 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 25% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,247 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 75% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3,819 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 20%, Truku 2%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. O micidekay kalimelaan i niyaro' Isaetipan pahikukian hananay a niyaro'. O patirengan to faelohay a niyaro' no icowacowaay a finacadan no Pangcah/'Amis mafolaw tayni. O liklik no serayan dafdaf O lihaf no pakapalidingay pakapaliding no niyaro' a kasa'etal Pangcah/'Amis o sowal no 'Amis a sowal, o Payrang a sowal o lalowadan no niyaro' Ono pokpok a taliyok no niyaro' koni itiyaho, o mafolaway tayni ko alomanay a maro' itini tahanini, o nai Kohkoh, Cirakayan, Tafalong ato Posong a niyaro', patireng tona Isaetipan pahikukian a niyaro mangata to 20 a mihecaan. O kasadakan no lihaf "續修花蓮縣志"─族群篇 地名檢索系統
S.PHON: isaətipan paħiko~u~ukian itiniaj i *iʡan ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u isaətipan paħiko~u~ukian a nijaro~uʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. o~u miʦiɬ~ɮəkaj kaɾiməɾaan i nijaro~uʡ isaətipan paħiko~u~ukian ħananaj a nijaro~uʡ. o~u patirəŋan to~u faəɾo~uħaj a nijaro~uʡ no~u iʦo~uwaʦo~uwaaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u paŋʦaħ/ʡamis mafo~uɾaw tajni. o~u ɾikɾik no~u sərajan ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf o~u ɾiħaf no~u pakapaɾiɬ~ɮiŋaj pakapaɾiɬ~ɮiŋ no~u nijaro~uʡ a kasaʡətaɾ paŋʦaħ/ʡamis o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis a so~uwaɾ, o~u pajraŋ a so~uwaɾ o~u ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~uno~u po~ukpo~uk a taɾijo~uk no~u nijaro~uʡ ko~uni itijaħo~u, o~u mafo~uɾawaj tajni ko~u aɾo~umanaj a maro~uʡ itini taħanini, o~u nai ko~uħko~uħ, ʦirakajan, tafaɾo~uŋ ato~u po~uso~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, patirəŋ to~una isaətipan paħiko~u~ukian a nijaro~u maŋata to~u ** a miħəʦaan. o~u kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u ɾiħaf "******"**** ******
S.FORM: Isaetipan pahikukian Itiniay i Ji'an Cen no Hualien ko Isaetipan pahikukian a niyaro', 1,927 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 5,066 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 25% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,247 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 75% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3,819 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 20%, Truku 2%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. O micidekay kalimelaan i niyaro' Isaetipan pahikukian hananay a niyaro'. O patirengan to faelohay a niyaro' no icowacowaay a finacadan no Pangcah/'Amis mafolaw tayni. O liklik no serayan dafdaf O lihaf no pakapalidingay pakapaliding no niyaro' a kasa'etal Pangcah/'Amis o sowal no 'Amis a sowal, o Payrang a sowal o lalowadan no niyaro' Ono pokpok a taliyok no niyaro' koni itiyaho, o mafolaway tayni ko alomanay a maro' itini tahanini, o nai Kohkoh, Cirakayan, Tafalong ato Posong a niyaro', patireng tona Isaetipan pahikukian a niyaro mangata to 20 a mihecaan. O kasadakan no lihaf "續修花蓮縣志"─族群篇 地名檢索系統
S.PHON: isaətipan paħiko~u~ukian itiniaj i *iʡan ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u isaətipan paħiko~u~ukian a nijaro~uʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. o~u miʦiɬ~ɮəkaj kaɾiməɾaan i nijaro~uʡ isaətipan paħiko~u~ukian ħananaj a nijaro~uʡ. o~u patirəŋan to~u faəɾo~uħaj a nijaro~uʡ no~u iʦo~uwaʦo~uwaaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u paŋʦaħ/ʡamis mafo~uɾaw tajni. o~u ɾikɾik no~u sərajan ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf o~u ɾiħaf no~u pakapaɾiɬ~ɮiŋaj pakapaɾiɬ~ɮiŋ no~u nijaro~uʡ a kasaʡətaɾ paŋʦaħ/ʡamis o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis a so~uwaɾ, o~u pajraŋ a so~uwaɾ o~u ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~uno~u po~ukpo~uk a taɾijo~uk no~u nijaro~uʡ ko~uni itijaħo~u, o~u mafo~uɾawaj tajni ko~u aɾo~umanaj a maro~uʡ itini taħanini, o~u nai ko~uħko~uħ, ʦirakajan, tafaɾo~uŋ ato~u po~uso~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, patirəŋ to~una isaətipan paħiko~u~ukian a nijaro~u maŋata to~u ** a miħəʦaan. o~u kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u ɾiħaf "******"**** ******
